scripts.build: command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v mud >/dev/null 2>&1 && mud build || echo 'Forge or MUD CLI not installed, skipping build'
scripts.clean: command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1 && forge clean && rm -rf src/codegen || echo 'Forge not installed, skipping clean'
scripts.test: if [ -n "$(find test -name '*.t.sol' -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then export PATH="$PWD/node_modules/.bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; export PRIVATE_KEY=${PRIVATE_KEY:-0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80}; mud test --port 4252; else echo 'No contract tests defined (test/**/*.t.sol not found); skipping mud test'; fi
